name: Square
description: Japanese RPG developer and publisher best known for Final Fantasy, Chrono Trigger, Secret of Mana, and Xenogears.

eras.title: Famicom RPG Foundation
eras.description: Early Square period culminating in Final Fantasy.

eras.title: Super Famicom Golden Age
eras.description: Peak 16-bit RPG period with Final Fantasy, Mana, and Chrono Trigger.

eras.title: PlayStation Cinematic RPG Era
eras.description: Final Fantasy VII and Square's defining 3D cinematic RPG period before the Enix merger.

notes: Use this for the historic Square identity before Square Enix.
